creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
Unlike for bugzilla 272965 and its panics during udp_input,
my debug build does replicate the panics reported in this
bugzilla entry for panics during in6ifa_ifwithaddr. All the
reported test cases replicate the reported panics.

Thus I can reasonably test proposed patches for this
bugzilla --but not for bugzilla 272965.
